data.title: Bitcoin Takes Aim At All-Time Highs: What Does It Mean For Altcoins?
data.description: Crypto trader Smiley Capital shared insights on how Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) potential expansion could impact altcoins in the coming months.

data.title: Expert Ratings For Global E Online
NASA Assigns 2 Missions To SpaceX For 2025 After Boeing's Starliner Stranded Astronauts
data.description: NASA will launch both its Crew-10 and Crew-11 missions to the International Space Station with the help of SpaceX in 2025, the agency said earlier this week, while adding that it is yet to ascertain when the next Boeing Starliner flight would be.

data.title: Trump's Potential Federal Reserve Pick Defends Rate Cuts After Ex-President Slammed Jerome Powell's Move
data.description: This stance contrasts with Trump's remarks at the Detroit Economic Club, where he labeled the rate cut as a political maneuver.

data.title: Meta Employee Making $400K A Year Says They Were Fired After Using $25 Dinner Credit To Buy Toothpaste
data.description: Meta Platforms has reportedly terminated several employees in Los Angeles for misusing meal credits to buy toothpaste.
